content.body: What are the next steps on bringing `structuredClone` into the language? https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/issues/2555 Should it just be a needs-consensus PR? Was anyone planning on working on it? /cc @syg:mozilla.org
content.formatted_body: What are the next steps on bringing structuredClone into the language? https://github.com/tc39/ecma262/issues/2555 Should it just be a needs-consensus PR? Was anyone planning on working on it? /cc @syg

content.body: i'm not planning to work on it. next steps IIRC was to satisfy Mark's Proxy requirements
basically just add a branch for proxies which uses the standard MOP operations just as if they were ordinary objects
pretty trivial to spec, I can write it up if you want
but I have basically given up on trying to get WHATWG to do things
maybe I gotta start going to whatnot meetings or something
alternatively we could in principle change the definition while pulling it in, which might be easier procedurally
🙏 @bakkot:matrix.org yes please get `structuredClone` over the finish line
content.formatted_body: 🙏 @bakkot yes please get structuredClone over the finish line
